title: duggena asperula
intro: Duggena asperula, commonly known as Asperula, is a low-growing, perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its various health benefits, which include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, and also for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The therapeutic actions of Asperula plant are attributed to its bioactive constituents, including iridoids like asperuloside and geniposide, which have been shown to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immunomodulatory activities. Asperula's bioactive constituents also contribute to its therapeutic actions, such as reducing inflammation, protecting against oxidative stress, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties.
